artPrompt: The tense instant a grimy carnival hand snatches a bag of chips across a rigged game counter in hard foreshortening, the snack thrust toward the viewer as collateral while a wheel of fortune blurs behind. Hot-gold firelight and sickly neon rake the smoky black tent; dice and coins scatter, ember sparks streak, a shakedown in motion, rendered as a bold painted graphic-novel splash — strong silhouettes, heavy directional inking and dramatic shadow shapes, fully painted (not flat cel comic).
name: Snack as Collateral
text:
As an additional cost to cast this spell, the most recently snacking player must declare their snack as collateral.
Destroy target creature. If the chosen player does not share their snack before your next turn, you draw two cards. (The snack was always the real wager.)
flavorText: "You're good for it. The chips, I mean. Hand 'em over."

extras.tableState: the table snack as wager collateral
